chunks.title: Introduction and Royal Wisdom
chunks.reason: Contains the title of the collection followed by wisdom regarding God, kings, and silver refining.

chunks.title: Advice on Courtly Conduct
chunks.reason: A cohesive unit of advice regarding humility before the king and handling disputes with neighbors.

chunks.title: Wisdom Sayings on Speech and Behavior
chunks.reason: A series of distinct metaphors illustrating the value of timely words, patience, moderation, and the danger of false testimony.

chunks.title: Final Exhortations on Enemies and Self-Control
chunks.reason: Concludes with instructions on treating enemies, the nature of secrets, contentment, and self-restraint.
